scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
